subject: READY: v0.4.6-cu124 re-pushed with your start.sh CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL fix — re-deploy to verify
body:
cu124 rebuild SUCCESS (mpi-ci run 27627514827, 10m53s). ghcr.io/madponyinteractive/cubric-vision-pod:v0.4.6-cu124 re-pushed with your start.sh CUBRIC_ROOT/CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL fix + wrapper 0.2.8. Package public.

TO VERIFY: any Pod created on the OLD v0.4.6-cu124 must be RE-DEPLOYED (delete + create fresh) — RunPod caches the old image layer, a warm restart won't pull the new start.sh. Create a NEW Any-region ephemeral GPU Pod (app sends CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL='1'). Expect: models install to /cubric-data on the CONTAINER disk → Disk usage climbs with the model, the ~20GB default volume sits unused. Telemetry should flip from your earlier finding (Disk 31MB/60GB, Volume 7GB/20GB) to Disk climbing, Volume idle.

Ping me with the result. If good, MPI-78 image dependency is satisfied for cu124. cu128 (Blackwell) + cpu (download-mode) pick up the same start.sh whenever I build them.
